attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SXMHOI.MESSAGE_ID	,
SXMHOI.CREATION_DATE	,
SXMHOI.CREATED_BY	,
SXMHOI.LAST_UPDATE_DATE	,
SXMHOI.	LAST_UPDATED_BY,
SXMHOI.PO_NUMBER	,
SXMHOI.SO_NUMBER	,
SXMHOI.PARTNER_NAME	,
SXMHOI.ORG_CODE	,
SXMHOI.CISCO_DUNS_NUMBER	,
SXMHOI.PARTNER_DUNS_NUMBER,	
SXMHOI.RETURN_FROM	,
SXMHOI.B2B_MFG_STATUS	,
SXMHOI.RETRY_COUNT	,
SXMHOI.TRANSMISSION_DATE	,
SXMHOI.PROCESS_STATUS	,
SXMHOI.ATTRIBUTE1	,
SXMHOI.ATTRIBUTE2	,
SXMHOI.ATTRIBUTE3	,
SXMHOI.ATTRIBUTE4	,
SXMHOI.ATTRIBUTE5	,
SXMHOI.ATTRIBUTE6	,
SXMHOI.ATTRIBUTE7	,
SXMHOI.ATTRIBUTE8	,
SXMHOI.ATTRIBUTE9	,
SXMHOI.ATTRIBUTE10	,
SXMHOI.ATTRIBUTE11	,
SXMHOI.ATTRIBUTE12	,
SXMHOI.ATTRIBUTE13	,
SXMHOI.ATTRIBUTE14	,
SXMHOI.ATTRIBUTE15	,
SXMHOI.REQUEST_ID	,
SXMHOI.GES_UPDATE_DATE	,
SXMHOI.GLOBAL_NAME	,
SXMHOI.BATCH_ID	,
SXMHOI.CREATE_DATETIME	,
SXMHOI.ACTION_CODE,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE	
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC SXMHOI
WHERE
NOT EXISTS (
			SELECT 1 
			FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
			WHERE SXMHOI.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
		   ) OR
NOT EXISTS
		  (
			SELECT 1 
			FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO   
			WHERE SXMHOI.ORG_CODE = NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE
		  ) OR
NOT EXISTS
		 (
			SELECT 1 			
					FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER  NSPO					
					WHERE NSPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM = SXMHOI.PO_NUMBER
					AND SS_CD='CG'	
					GROUP BY NSPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM
		 ) OR
NOT EXISTS
		(
			SELECT 1 
					FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSSO
					WHERE CAST (NSSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AS BIGINT ) =CAST(SXMHOI.SO_NUMBER AS BIGINT)			
					GROUP BY BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
		)

SELECT  
RANK () OVER (ORDER BY SMP.MESSAGE_ID) + MAX_VAL RTRN_ITMS_FRMSLC_MFG_PRTNR_KEY,
SMP.MESSAGE_ID AS SK_MESSAGE_ID
FROM  
	(SELECT COALESCE (MAX (RTRN_ITMS_FRMSLC_MFG_PRTNR_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL
	FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_RTRN_ITMS_FRM_SLC_MFG_PRTNR) SMPO,
	(SELECT 
	SMET.MESSAGE_ID
	FROM 
		(SELECT 
		SXMHOI.MESSAGE_ID,		
		SXMHOI.GLOBAL_NAME,
		SXMHOI.ORG_CODE,
		SXMHOI.SO_NUMBER,
		SXMHOI.PO_NUMBER
		FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC SXMHOI
	UNION ALL
		SELECT 
		EXCXMHOI.MESSAGE_ID,
		EXCXMHOI.GLOBAL_NAME,
		EXCXMHOI.ORG_CODE,
		EXCXMHOI.SO_NUMBER,
		EXCXMHOI.PO_NUMBER
		FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC EXCXMHOI
		) SMET
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		ON SMET.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO   
		ON	SMET.ORG_CODE = NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE
	INNER JOIN (SELECT NSPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,MIN(NSPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY)  AS PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY
			FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER  NSPO
			GROUP BY NSPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM) NPOK
			ON NPOK.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM = SMET.PO_NUMBER
	INNER JOIN (SELECT NSSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AS BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,MIN(NSSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY) AS SALES_ORDER_KEY
			FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSSO
			GROUP BY NSSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT) NSOK
			ON CAST(NSOK.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AS BIGINT ) =CAST(SMET.SO_NUMBER AS BIGINT)) SMP	  
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
	(
	SELECT 
	1 
	FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_RTRN_ITMS_FRM_SLC_MFG_PRTNR SPO
	WHERE SPO.SK_MESSAGE_ID = SMP.MESSAGE_ID
	)

SELECT 
SRIFSMP.RTRN_ITMS_FRMSLC_MFG_PRTNR_KEY AS RTRN_ITMS_FRMSLC_MFG_PRTNR_KEY,
CASE SXMHOI.PROCESS_STATUS WHEN 'C' THEN 'COMPLETED'WHEN 'N' THEN 'NEW' WHEN 'E' THEN 'ERROR' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END   AS  PROCESS_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(SXMHOI.RETURN_FROM,'UNKNOWN') AS  RETURN_FROM_CD,
COALESCE(SXMHOI.CREATION_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS  CREATE_DT,
COALESCE(SXMHOI.TRANSMISSION_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS  TRANSMISSION_DT,
NSOK.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS  SALES_ORDER_KEY,
COALESCE(NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,-999) AS  INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY,
SXMHOI.MESSAGE_ID AS SK_MESSAGE_ID,       
NPOK.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY AS  PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY,
NPOK.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM AS PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
(CASE WHEN NRIFSMP.RTRN_ITMS_FRMSLC_MFG_PRTNR_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE          
FROM
(
SELECT 
 SXMHO.GLOBAL_NAME,
 SXMHO.MESSAGE_ID,
 SXMHO.ORG_CODE,
 SXMHO.SO_NUMBER,
 SXMHO.PO_NUMBER,
 SXMHO.PROCESS_STATUS,
 SXMHO.RETURN_FROM,
 SXMHO.CREATION_DATE,
 SXMHO.TRANSMISSION_DATE
 FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC SXMHO
UNION ALL
SELECT 
 EXMHOI.GLOBAL_NAME,
 EXMHOI.MESSAGE_ID,
 EXMHOI.ORG_CODE,
 EXMHOI.SO_NUMBER,
 EXMHOI.PO_NUMBER,
 EXMHOI.PROCESS_STATUS,
 EXMHOI.RETURN_FROM,
 EXMHOI.CREATION_DATE,
 EXMHOI.TRANSMISSION_DATE
 FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC EXMHOI
) SXMHOI
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON SXMHOI.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_RTRN_ITMS_FRM_SLC_MFG_PRTNR SRIFSMP	
	ON SXMHOI.MESSAGE_ID = SRIFSMP.SK_MESSAGE_ID	
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
	ON	SXMHOI.ORG_CODE = NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE
INNER JOIN (SELECT NSSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AS BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,MIN(NSSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY) AS SALES_ORDER_KEY
	FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSSO
	GROUP BY BK_SO_NUMBER_INT) NSOK
	ON CAST( NSOK.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AS BIGINT )=CAST(SXMHOI.SO_NUMBER AS BIGINT)
INNER JOIN (SELECT NSPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,MIN(NSPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY) AS PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY
	FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER  NSPO
	WHERE NSPO.SS_CD ='CG' 
	GROUP BY NSPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM) NPOK
	ON NPOK.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM = SXMHOI.PO_NUMBER	
LEFT JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RTRN_ITMS_FRM_SLC_MFG_PRTNR NRIFSMP
	ON SXMHOI.MESSAGE_ID = NRIFSMP.SK_MESSAGE_ID
